message:
test(api): add unit tests for health and prompts API routes

Adds comprehensive Vitest unit tests for three API routes that previously
had no test coverage:

- /api/health: verifies 200 status, prompt counts, timestamp, version fields
- /api/health/ready: tests 200 on healthy, 503 on degraded, no-store cache header
- /api/prompts: tests registry payload shape, ETag/If-None-Match 304 handling,
  category/tag filtering, featured filter, and cache headers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
